# RWA (Real World Assets)

## Meld Gold

Meld Gold is a blockchain-based platform that tokenizes real physical gold and silver, making precious metals accessible, tradable, and usable in digital form. It's one of the standout Real World Asset (RWA) projects in the Algorand ecosystem, allowing anyone to own, buy, sell, transfer, or even redeem fractional amounts of actual gold/silver without dealing with traditional storage, vaults, or high barriers to entry.

- Meld Gold Website: https://www.meld.gold/

## Lofty

Lofty AI (often just called Lofty) is a leading fractional real estate investment platform built on Algorand, allowing everyday investors to buy, own, and earn from shares of actual U.S. rental properties — starting as low as $50 per token. It's one of the most prominent Real World Asset (RWA) projects in the Algo ecosystem, often compared to "the NASDAQ for real estate" due to its liquid, tokenized marketplace.

Key Features:

- **Tokenized Properties** — Each real estate asset (single-family homes, multi-family, vacation rentals, etc.) is tokenized as Algorand Standard Assets (ASAs). Tokens represent fractional ownership in a property held by a legal DAO LLC (decentralized autonomous organization structure in the U.S.).
- **Low Barrier Entry** — Invest from $50 (or even less in some cases), no need for large down payments, real estate experience, or connections.
- **Daily Rental Income** — Once a property is fully funded, owners receive rental payouts daily (in USDC stablecoin) via automated smart contracts — thanks to Algorand's ultra-low fees (~0.001 ALGO per tx) and high throughput.
- **Liquidity & Secondary Market** — Buy/sell tokens 24/7 on Lofty's internal marketplace with instant settlement. Trades use USDC (even if you pay via fiat like credit card/ACH), and tokens can be held in any Algorand wallet.
- **Governance** — Token holders participate in property decisions through the DAO structure.
- **Security & Compliance** — Smart contracts audited by CertiK; properties vetted by local teams + proprietary AI; platform emphasizes transparency with full docs available.

- Lofty AI Website: https://www.lofty.ai/
